themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Wherefore the people did chide with Moses, and said, Give us water that we may drink —The ver...". Word-study detail reinforces "תְּנַסּ֖וּן: ye with me wherefore do ye tempt - to test; by implication, to attempt".
